_comment: CONFIG 2 -- three datasets, all read into memory (backed_mode=false). The two RNA datasets are the existing in-memory .h5ad demos (Mouse from Zenodo, PBMC from S3); the third adds a PBMC ATAC layer (PBMC_atac.zarr) loaded fully into memory, with the matrix-backed ATAC Browser enabled. genome=hg38 auto-downloads the GENCODE v50 basic GTF for the ATAC gene-model track. Three top-level dataset tabs. If your cluster has no internet, swap each sc_data for a local path.

Mouse_RNA.description: Mouse oligodendrocyte-lineage scRNA-seq from an EAE study -- 5,264 cells x 32,285 genes, 6 cell types across EAE vs control. Downloaded once to cache, then read fully into memory.

PBMC_RNA.description: Human PBMC scRNA-seq (RNA modality of a 10x multiome dataset) -- 8,677 cells x 36,591 genes, 7 cell types. Library-size normalized + log1p. Downloaded once to cache, then read fully into memory.

PBMC_ATAC.description: Matching PBMC scATAC-seq -- 8,677 cells x 87,424 peaks (var_names are chr:start-end peak coordinates), 7 cell types. Loaded into memory; the ATAC Browser reads peak columns and overlays GENCODE gene models.

title: GUANACO demo -- mouse RNA + PBMC RNA + PBMC ATAC (three datasets)
